acceptanceSignals: Domain flows run on real PostgreSQL/testcontainers.
In-memory production persistence paths are removed.

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Rust Persistence Integration in 0 attempts

reinforcementResults.name: Contract Lockstep Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Reviewed against the Rust persistence feature scope and active contract policy. Production runtime wiring is SQL-backed with explicit transactional repositories and `PgPool` tuning (`src/persistence.rs`, `src/bin/observability_runtime_service.rs`), real PostgreSQL/testcontainers domain-flow tests are present (`tests/postgres_runtime_state_persistence.rs`, `tests/postgres_vendor_compliance_persistence.rs`), and API-surface changes are synchronized across contract source + OpenAPI + generated TS client (`src/contract.rs`, `contract/openapi/openapi.yaml`, `contract/openapi/openapi.json`, `contract/generated/ts-client/models/ErrorCode.ts`). No concrete current-feature blockers found in this workspace.

reinforcementResults.name: Persistence Integrity Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: No blocking issues found for this feature. The workspace shows SQL-backed repositories with explicit transaction boundaries, production runtime wiring bound to PostgreSQL (with in-memory paths test-gated only), migration up/down/invariant proof scripts and CI gate coverage, real-PostgreSQL testcontainers coverage for core domain persistence flows, and checked-in `.sqlx` query metadata for compile-time SQL verification. Residual gap: I could not execute `cargo`/test commands in this read-only sandbox, so this verdict is based on committed code and verification artifacts.

reinforcementResults.name: No-Legacy/Fallback Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass based on static workspace review. The runtime is wired to a single SQL persistence path in production (`build_operational_pg_pool_from_env` + `VendorComplianceSqlRepository`/`SqlJsonStateRepository` in `observability_runtime_service`), with in-memory persistence variants gated to tests via `#[cfg(test)]`. SQL repositories implement explicit transactional mutation (`begin` + `SELECT ... FOR UPDATE` + commit) and pool tuning is configurable via `PRELAUNCH_DB_POOL_*` envs. Real PostgreSQL/testcontainers coverage is present for core domain flows (`tests/postgres_runtime_state_persistence.rs`, `tests/postgres_vendor_compliance_persistence.rs`). `sqlx` compile-time macro usage is backed by committed `.sqlx` metadata and CI Rust test execution/migration gates. No concrete policy blocker for this feature was found.

excludedApproaches: Mock-only DB verification for critical flows.
executionConstraints: Implement explicit SQL repos and transactions.
